headline: INCIDENT: DELTA A339 OVER ATLANTIC ON MAY 2ND 2026, ENGINE PROBLEM

meta.narrative: A DELTA AIRLINES AIRBUS A330-900, REGISTRATION N429DX PERFORMING FLIGHT DL-59 FROM LONDON HEATHROW (UK) TO BOSTON (USA) WAS ENROUTE OVER THE ATLANTIC WHEN THE CREW DECIDED TO DIVERT DUE TO AN ENGINE PROBLEM.

headline: INCIDENT: UNITED B752 NEAR NEWARK ON APR 30TH 2026, PITOT HEATER NOT WORKING

meta.narrative: A UNITED AIRLINES BOEING 757-200, REGISTRATION N14102 PERFORMING FLIGHT UA-1234 WAS CLIMBING OUT OF NEWARK WHEN THE CREW REPORTED A PITOT HEATER FAILURE.

headline: INCIDENT: UNITED B739 NEAR CHICAGO ON APR 30TH 2026, ODOUR IN CABIN

meta.narrative: A UNITED AIRLINES BOEING 737-900, REGISTRATION N66848 PERFORMING FLIGHT UA-567 WAS ENROUTE NEAR CHICAGO WHEN AN ODOUR WAS DETECTED IN THE CABIN.
